taskDescription: Restructure this ADR: (1) Remove the Conclusion section. (2) Insert a new '## Premise' section after Context, with the conclusion content rewritten as a premise. (3) In Decision, change 'See the rationale in our conclusion below' to 'See the foundational premise above'. (4) In Migration, change 'The legacy approach' to 'The pre-event-sourcing approach'. (5) Add a short historical comment on the updated reference line in Decision explaining that the conclusion was promoted to a premise.
workflowA: Use only read_file and edit/write (or StrReplace). No ChangeDown, no tracking, no git.
workflowB: Use read_tracked_file and exactly five propose_change calls (one per operation), then git add and commit.
workflowC: Use read_tracked_file and one propose_batch with all five operations, then git add and commit.
workflowD: Use read_file and edit/write (or StrReplace), then git add and commit.
